title: Himachal Pradesh Administrative Tribunal (Procedure) Amendment Rules 2015

(1) इन िनयम犘 का संि楹玅 नाम िहमाचल 灹देश 灹शासिनक अिधकरण (灹琈灙या) संशोधन िनयम, 2016 है । (2) ये राजप灴 म犆 灹काशन क琉 तारीख को 灹वृ瀄त ह犘गे । 2. िहमाचल 灹देश 灹शासिनक अिधकरण (灹琈灙या) िनयम, 2015 के िनयम 29 म犆,-- (i ) उपिनयम (2 ) म犆 '' सहायक रिज瀡灩ार'' श瀑द犘 के 瀡थान पर ''उप रिज瀡灩ार'' श瀑द रखे जाएंगे । (ii) उपिनयम ( 3 ) म犆 '' सहायक रिज瀡灩ार ''श瀑द犘 के 瀡थान पर '' उप रिज瀡灩ार '' श瀑द रखे जाएंगे । [फा.सं.ए-11014/4/2008-एटी] देवेश चतुव犇दी, संयु猴 सिचव पाद पाद पाद पाद 琇ट瀉पण 琇ट瀉पण 琇ट瀉पण 琇ट瀉पण :- मूल िनयम भारत के राजप灴 म犆 अिधसूचना सं .सा.का.िन. 428 (अ) 獧ारा तारीख 26 मई, 2015 को 灹कािशत 琈कए गए थे । -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF PERSONNEL, PUBLIC GRIEVANCES AND PENSIONS (Department of Personnel and Training) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 9th June, 2016 G.S.R.592 (E).— In exercise of powers conferred by clauses (d), (e), and (f) of sub-section (2) of section 35 and clause (c) of section 36 of the Administrative Tribunal Act, 1985 (13 of 1985), the Central Government makes the following rules further to amend the Himachal Pradesh Administrative Tribunal (Procedure) Rules, 2015, namely: 1. (1) These rules may be called the Himachal Pradesh Administrative Tribunal (Procedure) Amendment Rules, 2015. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the official Gazette. 2. In the Himachal Pradesh Administrative Tribunal (Procedure) Rules, 2015, in rule 29, (i) in sub-rule (2), for the words “Assistant Registrar”, the words “Deputy Registrar” , shall be substituted; (ii) in sub-rule (3), for the words “Assistant Registrar”, the words “Deputy Registrar” , shall be substituted. [F.No.A-11014/4/2008-AT] DEVESH CHATURVEDI, Jt. Secy. Footnote: The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India vide notification No.A-11014/4/2008-AT, dated 26th May, 2015. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
